audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + mua + N]]. Use mua before an item to say what someone buys.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + mua + N]]: Mua is introduced as a transitive acquisition verb with a purchasable nominal complement.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + mua + N

Use mua before an item to say what someone buys. Example: [[grammar:Tôi muốn mua áo sơ mi.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + mua + N

Mua is introduced as a transitive acquisition verb with a purchasable nominal complement. Literal example: [[grammar:Tôi muốn mua áo sơ mi.]]

audienceSections.normal: Put the thing you buy after `mua`: `mua áo sơ mi`. Here `vừa` means that clothing fits. It has other meanings that you will learn later.
audienceSections.expert: Mua identifies the acquired item. Vừa is restricted here to clothing that fits; its temporal and adverbial uses are separate. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Tôi muốn mua áo sơ mi.]] — I want to buy a shirt.
- [[grammar:Cửa hàng có áo sơ mi.]] — The shop has shirts.
- [[grammar:Tôi muốn mua quần.]] — I want to buy trousers.
- [[grammar:Cửa hàng có giày.]] — The shop has shoes.
- [[grammar:Tôi thích màu xanh.]] — I like blue.
- [[grammar:Thử áo sơ mi.]] — Try on the shirt.
- [[grammar:Áo sơ mi vừa.]] — The shirt fits.
- [[grammar:Quần cũng vừa.]] — The trousers fit too.
- [[grammar:Tôi mua áo sơ mi và quần.]] — I buy the shirt and trousers.
- [[grammar:Vâng.]] — Yes.

- [[grammar:Cửa hàng có áo sơ mi.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 2.
- [[grammar:Tôi muốn mua quần.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 3.
- [[grammar:Cửa hàng có giày.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 4.
- [[grammar:Tôi thích màu xanh.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 5.
- [[grammar:Thử áo sơ mi.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 6.
- [[grammar:Áo sơ mi vừa.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 7.
- [[grammar:Quần cũng vừa.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 8.
- [[grammar:Tôi mua áo sơ mi và quần.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 9.
- [[grammar:Vâng.]] — Literal reading evidence at Dialogue > line 10.

characters.heading: Sino-Vietnamese Vocabulary
characters.normal:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| quần | 裙 | trousers; pants | `Tôi muốn mua quần.` |
| thử | 試 | try on; try | `Thử áo sơ mi.` |

The characters show established Hán-Việt word parts for vocabulary first introduced in this chapter. Keep using the modern Vietnamese spellings from the reading.
characters.expert:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| quần | 裙 | trousers; pants | `Tôi muốn mua quần.` |
| thử | 試 | try on; try | `Thử áo sơ mi.` |

Expert context: the mappings record Vietnamese lexical history and constituent order, not a claim that modern Vietnamese writes these words in characters or that every sequence is a current Chinese lexical form.
